utility_details.judge_error: No runtime errors detected in either wi_skills or wo_skills runs. Both completed successfully and produced output files.
utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills is marginally more effective overall. Both runs produced high-quality reports that passed all 7 verifier checks and addressed most evaluation criteria. The key differentiator is J6 (sequenced action plan): wi_skills provides a clearly numbered, sequenced 5-step action plan with an explicit follow-up phase, while wo_skills presents a flat simultaneous list under 'Start tomorrow' without a clear first/second/third priority order for a non-expert operator. Both reports handled the estimate reliability diagnosis (J2), waste tracking gap (J3), delivery vulnerability (J4), non-accusatory theft hypothesis (J5), and dollar quantification (J7) at a high level. The skill's structured workflow primarily added value in enforcing the sequenced roadmap output, which is the most practically important element for an operator with no formal tracking infrastructure.
